name: Cornerstone OnDemand
tagline: AI-driven talent management and learning platform
description: Cornerstone OnDemand is a comprehensive talent management platform that uses AI to connect learning, skills, content, and workforce agility. Its AI engine maps organizational skills, identifies gaps, recommends personalized learning paths, and predicts future talent needs. Cornerstone's content universe provides access to millions of curated learning resources matched to individual development goals.
